home.title: Ice Boxes
home.emptyDescription: Click “New ice box” above to create your first backup profile.

create.title: Create ice box
create.description: Creating an ice box also prepares its backup branch and Skill document.
create.name: Ice box name
create.gitDirectDescription: OpenClaw pushes directly, great for frequent automatic sync.
create.uploadTokenDescription: No Git setup required. Package and upload on demand.
create.uploadEncryptionDescription: Only applies to “Archive upload”. Encryption happens locally before upload.
create.hintPlaceholder: Example: the long passphrase for the old MacBook
create.saveNote: This creates the matching branch: `{branch}` and syncs the ice box config.

errors.minKeyLength: Master key must be at least 12 characters. A long passphrase is recommended.
errors.keyMismatch: The two master keys do not match.
errors.needGitConfig: Configure the Git repository before creating an ice box.
errors.fillName: Start with the ice box name and we'll help generate the machine-id.
errors.invalidMachineId: machine-id must keep at least one letter, number, or hyphen.

detail.loadFailed: Failed to load ice box details
detail.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the ice box. Please try again later.
detail.restoreNeedGit: Save and test the Git repository on the home page first so restore knows where to fetch backups.
detail.restoreNeedTarget: Set the restore target directory first. Actual data will be restored into its `.openclaw` folder.
detail.restoreNeedConfirm: You need to confirm restore before it can run.
detail.restoreNeedOverwrite: An existing `.openclaw` folder was found. Confirm overwrite after backup before restoring.
detail.deletedDescription: Taking you back to the list. Freezer cleaned up nicely.
detail.notFoundDescription: This device may not have synced local storage yet, or the ice box has not been created.
detail.localOnlyTitle: This ice box currently only exists locally and is not confirmed on the remote yet.
